## 🛠️ Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🧩 New algorithm visualization
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (existing behavior changes — describe below)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only
- [ ] 🎨 UI / UX improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / benchmarks

## 🧪 How to Test

<!-- Step-by-step instructions to verify this works correctly. -->

1. Clone this branch
2. Run `npm run compile`
3. Press `F5` to open the Extension Development Host
4. Open `python/` and run...
5. Expected result: ...

## ✅ Pre-Submission Checklist

<!-- Complete all items before requesting review. -->

- [ ] `npm run compile` passes with no errors
- [ ] Extension launches correctly in Development Host (`F5`)
- [ ] Existing visualizations still work (bubble sort, benchmarking, graph)
- [ ] No unintentional console errors introduced
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type: description` convention
- [ ] New `viz.py` helper functions include a docstring (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation or README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots/GIFs included for UI changes
